national_food_security_supply.name: National Food Security & Supply Status
national_food_security_supply.description: Availability and accessibility of food in Nigeria. Covers national grain reserves, hunger levels, risk of famine, food sufficiency, and the overall state of food security in the country.

staple_crops_production.name: Staple Crops & Agricultural Production
staple_crops_production.description: Cultivation and harvest of major Nigerian staple crops. Includes Rice, Maize, Cassava, Yams, Sorghum, Millet, Wheat, and general crop production output and harvest reports.

farmer_sentiment_distress.name: Farmer Sentiment & Distress
farmer_sentiment_distress.description: The welfare and challenges of Nigerian farmers. Covers farmer poverty, debt, displacement due to conflict (herdsmen/farmer clashes), lack of support, and general livelihood struggles.

agricultural_inputs.name: Agricultural Inputs: Fertilizer, Seeds & Fuel
agricultural_inputs.description: Access to and cost of essential farming inputs. Includes Fertilizer (NPK, Urea), improved seeds, seedlings, tractors, farm machinery, and fuel/diesel costs for mechanized farming.

food_prices_market_dynamics.name: Food Prices & Market Dynamics
food_prices_market_dynamics.description: Market prices of food items and inflation. Covers the cost of a bag of rice, garri, tomatoes, onions, market inflation, rising food costs, and consumer purchasing power regarding food.

climate_agricultural_disasters.name: Climate & Agricultural Disasters
climate_agricultural_disasters.description: Environmental impact on agriculture. Includes floods destroying farmlands, drought, desertification, climate change effects, and pest infestations (locusts, quelea birds).

government_policy_programs.name: Government Policy & Agricultural Programs
government_policy_programs.description: Government intervention in agriculture. Includes the Anchor Borrowers Programme, CBN agricultural loans, Green Imperative, Ministry of Agriculture initiatives, and agricultural policy frameworks.

livestock_fisheries.name: Livestock & Fisheries
livestock_fisheries.description: Animal husbandry and aquaculture. Covers Cattle rearing, Poultry farming, Fishery, Piggery, Ranching, Grazing reserves, NLTP (National Livestock Transformation Plan), and poultry feed costs.

trade_supply_chain.name: Trade & Agricultural Supply Chain
trade_supply_chain.description: Import and export of agricultural goods. Includes food importation bans, border closures affecting food trade, export of cash crops (Cocoa, Cashew, Sesame), and logistics of moving food from farm to market.

public_unrest_food_related.name: Public Unrest & Political Risk (Food-Related)
public_unrest_food_related.description: Social unrest driven by food scarcity or cost. Includes food riots, looting of palliatives or warehouses, protests over hunger, and political instability tied to food security.
